member.name: M:IdentityAPI.Controllers.ClaimsUserContextProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{IdentityAPI.Controllers.ClaimsUserContextProvider},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor)
member.summary: User context provider that extracts user context from claims.

member.name: M:IdentityAPI.Controllers.UserController.CreateCosmosClient(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Create a CosmosClient supporting both classic AccountKey connection strings and AAD-only endpoints. The may be: - a full "AccountEndpoint=...;AccountKey=...;" connection string, OR - just a https:// endpoint URL (then DefaultAzureCredential is used), OR - "AccountEndpoint=...;" without AccountKey (then DefaultAzureCredential is used).
